title: lobelia cheranganiensis
intro: Lobelia cheranganiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the Cherangani lobelia, which is native to Kenya. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lobelia cheranganiensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antimalarial properties. In traditional medicine, Lobelia cheranganiensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
